chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1563 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6141/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.6140/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.12.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indher, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Muhammad Ali, Assistant Mukhtiarkar, Pano Akil on behalf of Mukhtiarkar, Pano Akil Respondent No.10 Amanullah present in person >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files comments on behalf of Respondents No.5, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Muhammad Ali Chachar, Assistant Mukhtiarkar, Pano Akil present in Court on behalf of Mukhtiarkar Taluka Pano Akil submits that the order passed by this Court as well as Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur dated 15.05.2025 have been complied with. Counsel for the petitioner affirms such position, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
